header: Train trackwork in the City may affect how you travel
description:
Monday 15 and Tuesday 16 June
Nightly from 9:40PM to 1:30AM, train trackwork on the City Circle may affect how you travel.
Trains do not run between Central and Wynyard, or on the City Circle.
Use light rail services between Central and Circular Quay.
For travel to T1 North Shore Line stations change at Wynyard or use metro services from Central.

header: L4 partial line closure for Parramatta Half Marathon
description: On Sunday 21 June, from 5AM to 12 midday, L4 Westmead and Carlingford Line light rail services will not run between Westmead and Parramatta Square due to road closures for the Parramatta Half Marathon.

header: L4 partial line closure for Parramatta Half Marathon

header: Extra L2 and L3 light rail services run during train trackwork in the City
description:
Saturday 20 and Sunday 21 June
Train trackwork on the City Circle may affect how you travel.
Trains do not run to Museum, St James or Circular Quay but continue to run between Central, Town Hall and Wynyard. Use light rail services to Circular Quay.
Metro services do not run between Tallawong and Sydenham.
Daily from 7AM to 7PM, extra L2 and L3 light rail services run between Circular Quay and Randwick or Juniors Kingsford.

header: L1 Dulwich Hill weeknight closures due to maintenance
description: Nightly from 8PM to 1AM: L1 Dulwich Hill from Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 June, and L2 Randwick and L3 Kingsford Lines, from Monday 22 to Thursday 25 June light rail will be impacted by closures due to planned trackwork and maintenance works.

header: L2 Randwick and L3 Kingsford Lines weeknight closures due to maintenance
description:
L2 Randwick and L3 Kingsford lines
L2 and L3 services will not run on Monday 22 to Thursday 25 June, nightly from 8PM to 1AM.
Use alternative transport including trains, metro, regular bus services or walking if able to, between Circular Quay and Randwick or Juniors Kingsford.
The L1 weeknight closure from Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 June may also impact your journey.

header: Lilyfield Light Rail lift is not available from 15 June
description:
The lift at Lilyfield Light Rail stop will be out of service from 15 June until further notice while replacement works are carried out. The outage is expected to continue for at least five weeks.
During this period, access to the light rail stop will be available only via stairs, if you are able to do so safely.
Customer requiring lift access should use the nearest accessible light rail stop at Leichhardt North.
To get to Leichardt North stop, from the Lilyfield stop, take the local 437 bus route from the Balmain Rd after Lilyfield Rd stop, exit at the Norton St after City West Link stop and walk to the Leichhardt North light rail stop to catch the light rail.
Please allow extra travel time and plan ahead.
